deal_summary: Bristol Myers Squibb and SystImmune have entered into a collaboration to develop and commercialize BL-B01D1, a bispecific antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) targeting EGFR and HER3 for breast cancer and other solid tumors. The partnership includes clinical development and commercialization rights, with Bristol Myers Squibb making an upfront payment and additional milestone payments.

Eli Lilly announced a partnership with NVIDIA to deploy NVIDIA's DGX SuperPOD supercomputing infrastructure to accelerate drug discovery and development, focusing on escaping traditional pharmaceutical lifecycle constraints through advanced AI and computational capabilities.
